title: handan-traffic-caught-by-city-landscape
brief: 正文横版插图，放在微信公众号文章《我只是听了首〈落了白〉，怎么就掉进了邯郸学步宇宙？》的‘泼天的流量，邯郸接住了’章节。画面表现：来自手机短视频的《落了白》旋律，像流动的声波与光带，从一侧的竖屏手机或短视频界面延展出来，横向落到邯郸古城、赵文化礼宴、成语典故、学步桥意象和城市夜色之间。重点是‘短视频流量被城市文旅接住’，不是旅游广告。横版构图，适合手机正文宽度阅读，画面不要过满，主体关系横向展开，有留白，有文化感和现代编辑插图感。不要任何文字、字幕、logo、二维码、箭头或信息图标签。
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'handan-traffic-caught-by-city-landscape'. Style: modern Chinese editorial illustration with restrained guochao influence, historical motifs reinterpreted through clean contemporary composition, rich but not gaudy colors, subtle paper texture, no text labels, no diagrams. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a body illustration inside a WeChat article read on mobile phones (~390px wide). Compose for narrow-width readability. Use generous negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
